headline: We dogfood UnClick on UnClick.
target: UnClick public and agent-facing product surfaces
nextAutomation: Nightly dogfood receipts refresh this board with live checks, scheduled XPass package proof, and scheduled public-safe boundary proof.

statusLegend.passing: A live check or scheduled package sweep ran and returned a passing result, or a scheduled boundary sweep ran and returned a passing result.
statusLegend.failing: A live check or scheduled package sweep ran and returned a failing result.
statusLegend.blocked: The check needs action before it can be marked passing, such as a missing credential, scope gate, or high-severity readiness gap.
statusLegend.pending: The check is planned, package-ready, or scaffolded, but scheduled proof is not available yet.

proofPolicy: Public dogfood receipts mark passing only when a live check or scheduled package sweep actually ran, or a scheduled boundary sweep actually ran. Blocked and pending are honest product states, not failures to hide.

xpassIndex.name: TestPass
xpassIndex.label: Live trust gate
xpassIndex.automation: PR check, scheduled smoke, dogfood receipt, wake-router watched
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: High mention volume because it protects merges and cron trust.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Keep it as the default proof gate while the rest of XPass catches up.

xpassIndex.name: UXPass
xpassIndex.label: Live dogfood lane
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: Medium mention volume when the dogfood receipt or runner needs attention.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Promote to scheduled proof once the credential path is consistently healthy.

xpassIndex.name: SecurityPass
xpassIndex.label: Safe proof live
xpassIndex.automation: Recurring static safety proof; active probes remain scope-gated
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: Low mention volume by design because unsafe probes stay disabled.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Add a deny-by-default recurring active-runner proof before live security checks.

xpassIndex.name: SlopPass
xpassIndex.label: Package-ready quality gate
xpassIndex.automation: Package runner, verdict pack, dogfood tests, XPass routing
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: Medium mention volume because historical QualityPass references now route here.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Add a recurring SlopPass public receipt before marking it live dogfood.

xpassIndex.name: SEOPass
xpassIndex.label: Live dogfood lane
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: Medium mention volume when SEO metadata, crawler, or AI-era readiness drifts.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Promote the read-only receipt into a scheduled baseline and GEOPass bundle handoff.

xpassIndex.name: CopyPass
xpassIndex.label: Package-ready
xpassIndex.automation: Deterministic copy review, CopyRoom boundary, dogfood tests
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: Medium mention volume for public wording, claims, docs, and source-copy risk.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Add a recurring CopyPass receipt with CopyRoom/source-copy proof.

xpassIndex.name: LegalPass
xpassIndex.label: Package-ready guidance
xpassIndex.automation: Legal guidance tools, pack schema, public proof boundaries
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: Medium mention volume when public claims, policy language, or disclaimers change.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Add a recurring LegalPass receipt that stays guidance-only, not legal certification.

xpassIndex.name: CommonSensePass
xpassIndex.label: Worker sanity gate
xpassIndex.automation: False-DONE and proof sanity checks for worker claims and queues
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: High mention volume around claims, proof receipts, merge-ready language, and queue health.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Publish the recurring proof receipt for queue and worker-claim sanity.

xpassIndex.name: FlowPass
xpassIndex.label: Package-ready
xpassIndex.automation: Journey map checks and end-to-end flow fixtures
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: Medium mention volume for onboarding, checkout, handoff, forms, and success states.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Add a recurring journey receipt with one public flow target.

xpassIndex.name: GEOPass
xpassIndex.label: Package-ready
xpassIndex.automation: AI answer-engine readiness scanner and metadata evidence
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: Medium mention volume for llms.txt, schema, bots, and answer-engine readiness.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Add a recurring answer-engine readiness receipt.

xpassIndex.name: RotatePass
xpassIndex.label: Boundary guard
xpassIndex.automation: Credential lifecycle docs and redaction guard
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: Low mention volume because live credential rotation stays behind explicit scope.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Add a safe local credential lifecycle receipt without touching real secrets.

xpassIndex.name: WakePass
xpassIndex.label: Wake and stale-work gate
xpassIndex.automation: Dispatch, stale ACK, heartbeat, and reclaim visibility
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: High mention volume when scheduled work stalls or needs a fresh owner.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Expose a public-safe stale-work receipt for dogfood runs.

xpassIndex.name: CompliancePass
xpassIndex.label: Readiness evidence
xpassIndex.automation: Local deterministic scanner and public readiness receipt
xpassIndex.mentionProfile: Low mention volume unless readiness evidence, claims, or docs drift.
xpassIndex.nextStep: Keep report language conservative and link more XPass receipts as they mature.

results.name: TestPass
results.summary: Dry-run receipt builder validated the TestPass result shape.
results.evidence: Dry run only. Live workflow calls /api/testpass-run with source=scheduled.
results.nextProof: Run the dogfood report without --dry-run and with a TestPass token before marking this passing.

results.name: UXPass
results.summary: Dry-run receipt builder validated the UXPass result shape.
results.evidence: Dry run only. Live workflow calls /api/uxpass-run against the public URL.
results.nextProof: Run the dogfood report without --dry-run and with a UXPass token before marking this passing.

results.name: SecurityPass
results.summary: Safe recurring proof verified SecurityPass remains deny-by-default before active probes.
results.evidence: Static proof checked the runner scope gate plus scanner wrapper safety settings; no active probes were run.

checks.name: runSkeletonScan verifies scope before creating a run.
runSkeletonScan verifies scope before fetching security headers.
runSecurityPack checks declared in-scope/out-of-scope assets before proof verification.
Gitleaks uses the current git scan command with scanner-side redaction.
OSV-Scanner uses the v2 source scan command and keeps source-path evidence.
OSV-Scanner keeps Rust call analysis explicitly disabled for safe source scans.
OSV-Scanner evidence keeps fixed-version and call-analysis context.
OSV-Scanner scores official CVSS vector evidence instead of defaulting it low.

results.nextProof: Add a scoped active-runner receipt before marking live security probes as passing.

results.name: SlopPass
results.summary: Package-backed quality review exists, but the public dogfood receipt has not run it yet.
results.evidence: SlopPass has a package runner, verdict pack, and dogfood tests; public status stays pending until a scheduled receipt exists.
results.nextProof: Add a recurring SlopPass public receipt before marking this passing.

results.name: SEOPass
results.summary: Dry-run receipt builder validated the SEOPass result shape.
results.evidence: Dry run only. Live workflow fetches public HTML, robots.txt, sitemap.xml, and llms.txt.
results.nextProof: Run the dogfood report without --dry-run so SEOPass can fetch the public SEO surfaces before marking it passing.

results.name: CopyPass
results.summary: Package-backed copy quality review exists, but the public dogfood receipt has not run it yet.
results.evidence: CopyPass has deterministic review tooling and CopyRoom boundary checks; public status stays pending until scheduled proof exists.
results.nextProof: Add a recurring CopyPass receipt with CopyRoom/source-copy proof.

results.name: LegalPass
results.summary: Package-backed policy and claims guidance exists, but the public dogfood receipt has not run it yet.
results.evidence: LegalPass has guidance tooling, pack schema, and public proof boundaries; public status stays pending until scheduled proof exists.
results.nextProof: Add a recurring LegalPass receipt that stays guidance-only, not legal certification.

results.name: CommonSensePass
results.summary: Worker sanity checks exist, but the public dogfood receipt has not run them yet.
results.evidence: CommonSensePass is routed for proof, queue, claim, false-DONE, and merge-ready sanity; public status stays pending until scheduled proof exists.
results.nextProof: Add a recurring CommonSensePass proof receipt for worker claims and queue health.

results.name: FlowPass
results.summary: Package-backed journey checks exist, but the public dogfood receipt has not run them yet.
results.evidence: FlowPass has journey fixtures for onboarding, checkout, handoff, forms, and success/failure states; public status stays pending until scheduled proof exists.
results.nextProof: Add a recurring FlowPass receipt for one public journey target.

results.name: GEOPass
results.summary: Package-backed answer-engine readiness checks exist, but the public dogfood receipt has not run them yet.
results.evidence: GEOPass has AI answer-engine readiness scanning for llms.txt, schema, bots, and metadata; public status stays pending until scheduled proof exists.
results.nextProof: Add a recurring GEOPass answer-engine readiness receipt.

results.name: RotatePass
results.summary: Credential lifecycle boundaries are documented and guarded, but no live credential rotation runs in public dogfood.
results.evidence: RotatePass stays boundary-only until a safe local receipt can prove redaction and lifecycle behavior without touching real secrets.
results.nextProof: Add a safe local RotatePass receipt that proves lifecycle handling without exposing secrets.

results.name: WakePass
results.summary: Wake and stale-work visibility exists, but the public dogfood receipt has not run a public-safe stale-work check yet.
results.evidence: WakePass powers dispatch, stale ACK, heartbeat, and reclaim visibility; public status stays pending until a public-safe receipt exists.
results.nextProof: Add a public-safe WakePass receipt for stale scheduled work and reclaim visibility.

results.name: CompliancePass
results.summary: CompliancePass scanned 27 readiness checks and scored 99.3/100.
results.evidence: See /enterprise/latest.json for the evidence-backed readiness report.

lastActionableFailure.title: No actionable dogfood failure in the latest receipt
lastActionableFailure.detail: The live checks that ran in this receipt did not report a blocking failure.
